name: Iron Core Armor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鋼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>核</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>収</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>納</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Equip only to a "Koa'ki Meiru" monster. During damage calculation only, monsters that battle with the equipped monster lose ATK equal to the equipped monster's Level x 100. If the equipped monster would be destroyed during the End Phase, you can send this card to the Graveyard instead.
eff: Equip only to a "Koa'ki Meiru" monster. During damage calculation only, monsters that battle with the equipped monster lose ATK equal to the equipped monster's Level x 100. If the equipped monster would be destroyed during the End Phase, you can send this card to the Graveyard instead.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
misc: Equips only to a specific target
